macros.name: obstack_specify_allocation
macros.definition: #define obstack_specify_allocation(h, size, alignment, chunkfun, freefun) \ _obstack_begin ((h), (size), (alignment), \ _OBSTACK_CAST (void *(*) (size_t), chunkfun), \ _OBSTACK_CAST (void (*) (void *), freefun))

macros.name: dpgettext
macros.definition: #define dpgettext(Domainname, Msgctxt, Msgid) \ pgettext_aux (Domainname, Msgctxt GETTEXT_CONTEXT_GLUE Msgid, Msgid, LC_MESSAGES)

macros.name: dcpgettext
macros.definition: #define dcpgettext(Domainname, Msgctxt, Msgid, Category) \ pgettext_aux (Domainname, Msgctxt GETTEXT_CONTEXT_GLUE Msgid, Msgid, Category)

macros.name: dnpgettext
macros.definition: #define dnpgettext(Domainname, Msgctxt, Msgid, MsgidPlural, N) \ npgettext_aux (Domainname, Msgctxt GETTEXT_CONTEXT_GLUE Msgid, Msgid, MsgidPlural, N, LC_MESSAGES)

macros.name: pgettext_expr
macros.definition: #define pgettext_expr(Msgctxt, Msgid) \ dcpgettext_expr (NULL, Msgctxt, Msgid, LC_MESSAGES)

macros.name: dpgettext_expr
macros.definition: #define dpgettext_expr(Domainname, Msgctxt, Msgid) \ dcpgettext_expr (Domainname, Msgctxt, Msgid, LC_MESSAGES)

macros.name: INT_REMAINDER_RANGE_OVERFLOW
macros.definition: #define INT_REMAINDER_RANGE_OVERFLOW(a, b, min, max) \ INT_DIVIDE_RANGE_OVERFLOW (a, b, min, max)

macros.name: _GL_BINARY_OP_OVERFLOW
macros.definition: #define _GL_BINARY_OP_OVERFLOW(a, b, op_result_overflow) \ op_result_overflow (a, b, \ _GL_INT_MINIMUM (_GL_INT_CONVERT (a, b)), \ _GL_INT_MAXIMUM (_GL_INT_CONVERT (a, b)))

macros.name: INT_ADD_OK
macros.definition: #define INT_ADD_OK(a, b, r) (! INT_ADD_WRAPV (a, b, r))

macros.name: INT_SUBTRACT_OK
macros.definition: #define INT_SUBTRACT_OK(a, b, r) (! INT_SUBTRACT_WRAPV (a, b, r))

macros.name: INT_MULTIPLY_OK
macros.definition: #define INT_MULTIPLY_OK(a, b, r) (! INT_MULTIPLY_WRAPV (a, b, r))

macros.name: _GL_INT_OP_CALC
macros.definition: #define _GL_INT_OP_CALC(a, b, r, op, overflow, ut, t, tmin, tmax) \ (overflow (a, b, tmin, tmax) \ ? (*(r) = _GL_INT_OP_WRAPV_VIA_UNSIGNED (a, b, op, ut, t), 1) \ : (*(r) = _GL_INT_OP_WRAPV_VIA_UNSIGNED (a, b, op, ut, t), 0))
